app.name: Manasitra
app.tagline: Mann Ka Mitra — Dimag ka Sathi

onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Manasitra tumhara private, anonymous dost hai. Koi login nahi. Koi judgment nahi. Sirf support.
onboarding.privacy_summary: Humein tumhara naam nahi pata. Hum tumhari chats save nahi karte. Sab kuch tumhare phone mein hi rehta hai.
onboarding.disclaimer: Manasitra ek AI companion hai, koi mental health professional nahi. Agar aap crisis mein hain, toh kripya qualified counselor ya helpline se contact karein.

chat.placeholder: Batao, kya chal raha hai dimag mein...
chat.error_ai: Connect karne mein problem aa rahi hai, par main yahan hu tumhare liye.
chat.quick_exit_label: Jaldi bahar niklo — session clear karo

mood.title: Kaisa feel kar rahe ho?
mood.note_placeholder: Koi note add karo (optional, 100 chars max)

dashboard.title: Tumhari Progress
dashboard.back_again: Welcome back! Har din mayne rakhta hai.

games.title: Relaxing Tools
games.subtitle: Apne liye thoda time nikalo
games.breathing_desc: Dimag shant karne ke liye guided breathing
games.tap_desc: Tension release karne ke liye halke taps
games.puzzle_desc: Focus wapas laane ke liye simple puzzle
games.canvas_desc: Colors ke zariye khud ko express karo
games.word_reset_desc: Positive words se dimag clear karo
games.gratitude_desc: Un cheezon ko yaad karo jinke liye tum thankful ho
games.body_scan_desc: Relax karne ke liye guided meditation
games.worry_box_desc: Apni tensions ko box mein lock kar do

crisis.headline: Tumhe akele sehne ki zaroorat nahi hai
crisis.subtext: Trained counselors abhi available hain. Help maangna himmat ki baat hoti hai.
crisis.i_am_safe: Main safe hu, mujhe aage baat karni hai
crisis.talk_to_someone: Kya kisi trained insaan se baat karna theek rahega?

privacy.title: Tumhari Privacy
privacy.stored_label: Jo data phone mein save hota hai
privacy.not_stored_label: Jo data KABHI save nahi hota
privacy.delete_button: Mera saara data delete kar do
privacy.delete_confirm: Kya tum sure ho? Ye data wapas nahi milega.
privacy.promise: Manasitra tumhara naam nahi janta. Tumhare jaane ke baad chats delete ho jati hain. Tumhare mood logs sirf tumhare phone mein rehte hain. Tum ek click mein sab kuch delete kar sakte ho. Ye tumhari private space hai.

errors.network: Internet connection nahi hai. Kuch features nahi chalenge.
errors.ai_unavailable: Abhi connect karne mein problem ho rahi hai. Ye kuch cheezein help kar sakti hain...
errors.storage_full: Tumhara session is device pe save nahi ho payega.

a11y.quick_exit: Jaldi bahar niklo — session clear karo aur home par jao
